-   HMI is the latest Cloudflare Service Worker as a Proxy to Biblegateway.

-   Query is <https://hmi.pjafischer.workers.dev/bgw/cache/?param=gen1:1>

-   Response is JSON structure like, when cached with typical duration 4 ms


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
{
    "success": true,
    "error": null,
    "data": {
        "param": "gen1:1",
        "searchQuery": "gen1:1",
        "versionQuery": "SG21",
        "cacheid": "v3.1",
        "from_cache": true,
        "upstream": {
            "ok": true,
            "status": 200
        }
    },
    "duration": 3,
    "href": "https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=gen1%3A1&version=SG21",
    "ref": "Genèse 1:1",
    "version": "Segond 21",
    "content": "1 Au commencement, Dieu créa le ciel et la terre."
}
 
```


:::
:::


-   response_object.content is the payload  along response_object.ref,  response_object.version abd response.duration [these four properties preserve previous interafaces]
